name: microbrowser
description: Minimal Electron browser for low-memory Linux devices (Pi Zero 2 W, armv7l, ~512 MB RAM)

scripts.bundle:armv7l: npm run build:armv7l && cp build/install.sh dist/microbrowser-linux-armv7l/install.sh && chmod +x dist/microbrowser-linux-armv7l/install.sh && tar -C dist -czf dist/microbrowser-armv7l.tar.gz microbrowser-linux-armv7l
scripts.bundle:x64: npm run build:x64    && cp build/install.sh dist/microbrowser-linux-x64/install.sh    && chmod +x dist/microbrowser-linux-x64/install.sh    && tar -C dist -czf dist/microbrowser-x64.tar.gz    microbrowser-linux-x64
